title: Send WhatsApp messages without saving contacts

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Quick Send is designed to streamline communication for monday users, directly integrating with your boards to offer seamless messaging capabilities.

Check it on monday marketplace: Quick Message - monday.com Marketplace

Key Benefits:

  • Direct Messaging on Popular Apps: Send messages via WhatsApp, Telegram, or iMessage without switching apps. Quick Send opens directly to the chat page with your message pre-filled, ensuring swift communication.
  • Customizable Message Templates: Create and personalize templates using dynamic fields from your board for rapid, tailored messaging.
  • No Need to Save Numbers: Send messages instantly to phone numbers listed in your boards without saving them to your contacts, perfect for quick, efficient communication.

Use Cases:

  • Client Communication: Send personalized messages to clients directly from your board.
  • Event Reminders: Easily send reminders or updates about meetings and deadlines.
  • Team Coordination: Quickly update your team on project statuses or changes.

posts.author: Kiara (Kiara)
posts.cookedHtml:
Quick Send streamlines communication for monday users, allowing you to send messages through WhatsApp, Telegram, and iMessage directly from your boards—no need to switch apps.

If you’re looking for even more features and customization, MBWhatsApp offers advanced privacy controls, media sharing enhancements, and more.

Check out MBWhatsApp here: https://mbwhat.download/

With Quick Send, you can quickly reach out to clients, send reminders, or coordinate with your team, and MBWhatsApp takes your messaging experience to the next level with added control and personalization.
